description:
Document in Arabic script. Probably legal, as the lower left portion looks like a witness statement. Dated: 563 AH? Needs examination. 

On verso there is an inscription related to a book, with unusual orthography and vocalization. "Commentary on Daniel according to the Peshaṭ, by Yishmaʿel b. Avraham Ibn Kuchak."
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
